nodes.name: TES3MP Zer0Custom (0.8.1)
nodes.summary: TES3MP 0.8.1 Zer0Custom - My custom Windows build of TES3MP - open-source Morrowind multiplayer - with a rebuilt launcher, rewritten rendering shaders, and a fully integrated server management console.

nodes.name: TES3ZER0EDIT
nodes.summary: TES3ZER0EDIT is a lightweight browser-based editor for Morrowind TES3 plugins, with record editing, book/text tools, header/master management, dialogue helpers, and early save-related utilities for advanced workflow

nodes.name: TES3ZER0NAME
nodes.summary: TES3ZER0NAME is a TES-inspired character name generator for players and modders. It helps create lore-friendly names for different races, genders, classes, and styles, making it useful both for new playthroughs and for populating mods with

nodes.name: NIFZER0EDIT
nodes.summary: NIFZER0EDIT - is a browser-based NIF viewer and editor for working with Gamebryo / NetImmerse assets directly in your web browser. It can be used on any operating system without installation, making it a convenient alternative for quick

nodes.name: Custom Shaders for TES3MP
nodes.summary: I present a custom shader collection I've built over time for my TES3MP project. OpenMW devs advanced post-processing in newer versions, leaving 0.47 projects behind. I'm fixing that—offering my shaders tailored for OpenMW 0.47 & TES3MP

nodes.name: SkyHUD for OpenMW
nodes.summary: This is a simple HUD conversion with a more interesting layout on the game screen!
